report_name: Massive Data Breach at NYC Health + Hospitals Exposes Data of 1.8 Million Individuals

identities.name: NYC Health + Hospitals Corporation
identities.description: The largest public health system in the United States, which suffered a massive data breach affecting approximately 1.8 million patients and employees.

indicators.name: Creation of New Local Administrator Account via Command Line
indicators.pattern:
title: Creation of New Local Administrator Account via Command Line
id: 2b9a8c1d-4e5f-4a1b-8c9d-0e1f2a3b4c5d
status: experimental
description: Detects the creation of a new local user and their addition to the local Administrators group using the 'net.exe' command-line utility. This is a common technique for establishing persistence on a compromised host.
references:
  - https://www.kaseya.com/blog/2026/05/20/the-week-in-breach-news-may-20-2026/
author: cyber.netsecops.io
date: 2026-05-20
modified: 2026-05-20
tags:
  - attack.t1136.001
  - attack.t1098
  - attack.persistence
  - attack.privilege_escalation
level: high
logsource:
  category: process_creation
  product: windows
detection:
  selection_creation:
    Image|endswith:
      - '\net.exe'
      - '\net1.exe'
    CommandLine|contains|all:
      - 'user'
      - '/add'
  selection_add_admin:
    Image|endswith:
      - '\net.exe'
      - '\net1.exe'
    CommandLine|contains|all:
      - 'localgroup'
      - 'administrators'
      - '/add'
  condition: 1 of selection_*
falsepositives:
  - Legitimate administrative activity. Should be correlated with other suspicious events.
indicators.description: Detects the creation of new administrative accounts, a hunting hint suggested in the article for identifying similar breaches.
